title: hieracium praecox subsp. furcillatum
intro: Hieracium praecox subsp. furcillatum, commonly known as Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium praecox subsp. furcillatum are believed to include wound healing, skin issues, and possibly even antimicrobial effects. In herbal preparations, Hawkweed is often used as a tincture, salve, or tea, though it is essential to consult a medical professional before using any herbal remedy.
